title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude 3.5 Sonnet completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots and vision, without maps or helper infrastructure. This represents an improvement over earlier Claude models that required complex helper systems to play the same game.
writeup: The video documents Claude Fable 5 completing Pokémon FireRed end-to-end using only raw game screenshots and vision, without maps or navigation aids. It matters because earlier Claude versions needed helper infrastructure to play, so removing those scaffolds isolates the model's multimodal reasoning as the driver of the run. The takeaway: a vision-only agent can perceive game state and act through a full playthrough, indicating gains in visual perception and agentic decision-making over prior versions.
